fields.label: Default Trial Days
fields.description: Default trial period in days (0 = no trial)

fields.label: Max Subscriptions per User
fields.description: Maximum concurrent subscriptions a user can hold

fields.label: Allow Downgrade
fields.description: Allow users to downgrade to a cheaper plan

fields.label: Enable Proration
fields.description: Calculate prorated credits on plan changes

fields.label: Expiration Check Interval (seconds)
fields.description: How often to check for expired subscriptions

fields.label: Dunning Intervals (days, comma-separated)
fields.description: Days after payment failure to send reminders (e.g., 3,7)

fields.label: Enable Bot Storefront
fields.description: Expose /tarifs, /add-ons, /tokens and /checkout over the messenger bridge

fields.label: Checkout Link Base URL
fields.description: Public fe-user origin the /checkout draft link points at (e.g. https://app.example.com)

fields.label: Checkout Draft TTL (seconds)
fields.description: How long a minted one-time checkout-draft token stays resolvable

fields.label: Enable Vendor Mode
fields.description: Let vendors own tarif plans and credit the vendor on plan purchases (stamps vendor_id on the invoice line)
